name: Castanas
description: The remotely triggered Castanas quietly deliver a lethal dose of electricity to unsuspecting enemies.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: The remotely triggered Castanas quietly deliver a lethal dose of electricity to unsuspecting enemies.

components.name: Circuits
components.description:
Various electronic components.

Location: Venus, Ceres, and the Kuva Fortress

components.name: Control Module
components.description:
Autonomy processor for Robotics. A Corpus design.

Location: Europa, Neptune, and the Void

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Update 32.2.0: Lua’s Prey
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Critical Chance and Status Chance stats not being listed for the Talons, Castanas, and Sancti Castanas in the Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon Remaster: Update 24.8.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed equipping Castanas (in default Skin) placing a larger version of one of the projectiles between the Warframes legs.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Update 22.20.0
patchlogs.changes:
Reduced the ammo pool of the Castanas family and Talons in Conclave. 
Increased the effect of gravity on the Castanas family and Talons in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.13.3
patchlogs.changes: Made the additional projectiles of Talons and Castanas from Multishot spread in a more uniform/predictable pattern.

patchlogs.name: Hydroid Prime: Update 21.6.0
patchlogs.changes:
Picking up disarmed thrown Secondary weapons (Kunai, Castanas, etc.) will now display the context action “Pick Up Thrown Weapon” instead of “Pick up Auto Pistol”.
Reduced the damage AoE radius of the Castanas family in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.4.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Castanas, Talons and Ogris projectiles being destroyed in flight doing 4x damage with 2x radius in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Update 21.4.0
patchlogs.changes:
Increased the damage Castanas do on impact in Conclave.
Fixed the Castanas not doing damage when detonated while airborne in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.3.1
patchlogs.changes: Fixed a bug where the Castanas damage was being displayed incorrectly in the Conclave Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Update 21: Chains of Harrow
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Magnum Force equipped on Castanas modded for multishot resulting in pin-point accuracy.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Update 20.5.0
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the detonation delay of detonated explosive weapons (Talons, Castanas, etc).

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview
patchlogs.changes:
Increased damage of Castanas series in Conclave.
Maximum amount of deployed Castanas reduced to 2 in Conclave.
Conclave Mod Heavy Warhead is no longer usable with Castanas or Talons.

patchlogs.name: Update: Specters of the Rail
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an incorrect material being used on the Castanas’ holster.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes:
Increased AoE damage of the Penta, Castanas series, Talons and Kulstar in Conclave.
Increased the lifetime of the Castanas series and Talons in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.10 & Tactial Alert: Divine Will
patchlogs.changes:
Removed the headshot multiplier from the Penta series, Castanas series, Kulstar, Talons and Angstrum in Conclave.
The Penta series, Castanas series, Kulstar, Talons and Angstrum’s explosive damage no longer ignores cover in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.4.0
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Castanas not having a duration if they pass through Volt's Electric Shield in Conclave

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.0.7
patchlogs.changes:
Castanas now have a 10 second lifetime duration when used in Conclave matches.
Castanas will now wake up Rested targets in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 18: The Second Dream
patchlogs.changes: Brakk, Bronco series, Detron series, Castanas Series and Pyrana are now available for use in Conclave.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Castanas not properly functioning with elemental damage and multishot Mods equipped.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.5: The Jordas Precept. + Hotfix 17.5.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Castanas being unable to destroy rotating laser traps in the Void.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.12.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue causing attachments to the Sancti Castanas and regular Castanas to turn grey.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.5: Operation Cryotic Front!
patchlogs.fixes: • Fixed issues with blank “Trigger” types in the UI for Penta, Castanas and Deconstructor.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.2.0: Avalanche Offensive
patchlogs.fixes: Update 14.2.0: Avalanche Offensive Psa: The Launcher May Require You To Enter Your Windows Administrator Password To Update Your Firewall Rules.Avalanche Offensive Is On Until Monday @ 12 Noon Edt! Avalanche Offensivedefeat The Corpus Arctic Eximus!A Message From Cantis Of The Red Veil Resistance:Here'S What You'Ll Need To Dogo Forth And Take Down The Corpus Arctic Eximus, Tenno!Additions:Weapon Balance Changes:     • Grakata    • Castanas    • Ogris    • Torid    • Penta    • Lanka    • Vectis    • Vulkar    • Angstrum:    • Acrid:    • Attica:    • Spectra & Flux Rifle:    • Snipetron (+Vandal):    • Torid Changes:    • All Launchers:Key Hosting Improvements:Changes:Fixes:

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.1.3
patchlogs.fixes: Tweaked the visual fidelity on Castanas explosions spawned from Hall of Mirror clones.

patchlogs.name: Update 13.8.0: Breeding Grounds
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Clients sometimes being able to throw unlimited amounts of Castanas which they could not detonate.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 12.5.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixes:·         Fixed an instance of player's not gaining mission completion rewards.·         Fixed a duplicate flashlight being present on the Castanas.·         Fixed an issue related to the Grustrag Three crashing/hanging the game when all squad members are killed.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 12.4.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed inability to fire Grinlok or throw Castanas and while sprinting.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 12.4.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed inconsistent spelling of Castanas in Dojo research.

patchlogs.name: Update 12.3.0: The Grustrag Three
patchlogs.fixes: Adjusted Timing to show Castanas in hand sooner after reload is complete.
